name: Chip

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The chip's label content, wrapped in a <span> between the leading icon/avatar and the close button.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Surface style: Default is a filled bg-secondary pill, Outline is bordered with a transparent fill, and Solid fills with the palette selected by Color.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.description: Palette used by Solid — one of primary, destructive, success, or warning. Any other value (including null) falls back to the secondary palette.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Chip size, driving text size, corner radius, avatar/close-icon dimensions, and (together with Density) the padding.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-chip density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the padding shifts — text size + radius stay governed by Size.

parameters.name: Closable
parameters.description: Shows a trailing remove (X) button. Clicking it invokes OnClose instead of OnClick (the click is stopped from propagating to the chip itself).

parameters.name: OnClose
parameters.description: Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

parameters.name: Clickable
parameters.description: Makes the chip itself an interactive role="button" surface — clickable and keyboard-activatable (Enter/Space) — invoking OnClick.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the chip: suppresses OnClick and OnClose, and applies a dimmed, non-interactive style.

parameters.name: Icon
parameters.description: Leading icon glyph string, rendered before ChildContent. Ignored when Avatar is set; takes precedence over IconContent.

parameters.name: Avatar
parameters.description: Leading avatar image URL, rendered as a rounded thumbnail before ChildContent. Takes precedence over Icon and IconContent.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the chip is pressed (only applies when Clickable is true). Default is None.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the chip's root div, after the size/variant/interactive classes.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

events.name: OnClose
events.description: Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    <Chip>Default</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Outline">Outline</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="primary">Primary</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="destructive">Destructive</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="success">Success</Chip>
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Closable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var tag in _tags)
    {
        var t = tag;
        <Chip Closable="true" OnClose="@(() => _tags.Remove(t))">@t</Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Clickable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var filter in _filters)
    {
        var f = filter;
        <Chip Clickable="true"
              Variant="@(_active == f ? Chip.ChipVariant.Solid : Chip.ChipVariant.Outline)"
              Color="@(_active == f ? "primary" : null)"
              OnClick="@(() => _active = f)">
            @f
        </Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The group's Chip children, laid out in a wrapping flex row.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

slots.description: The chip's label content, wrapped in a <span> between the leading icon/avatar and the close button.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.

mdSummary:
# Chip

Compact removable tag, optionally toggleable.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/chip

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Chip | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The chip's label content, wrapped in a \<span\> between the leading icon/avatar and the close button. |
| Chip | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot \<span\>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set. |
| Chip | Variant | `ChipVariant` | `ChipVariant.Default` | Surface style: Default is a filled bg-secondary pill, Outline is bordered with a transparent fill, and Solid fills with the palette selected by Color. |
| Chip | Color | `string?` | `` | Palette used by Solid — one of primary, destructive, success, or warning. Any other value (including null) falls back to the secondary palette. |
| Chip | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Chip size, driving text size, corner radius, avatar/close-icon dimensions, and (together with Density) the padding. |
| Chip | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-chip density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the padding shifts — text size + radius stay governed by Size. |
| Chip | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Chip | Closable | `bool` | `false` | Shows a trailing remove (X) button. Clicking it invokes OnClose instead of OnClick (the click is stopped from propagating to the chip itself). |
| Chip | OnClose | `EventCallback` | `` | Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true. |
| Chip | Clickable | `bool` | `false` | Makes the chip itself an interactive role="button" surface — clickable and keyboard-activatable (Enter/Space) — invoking OnClick. |
| Chip | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true. |
| Chip | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the chip: suppresses OnClick and OnClose, and applies a dimmed, non-interactive style. |
| Chip | Icon | `string?` | `` | Leading icon glyph string, rendered before ChildContent. Ignored when Avatar is set; takes precedence over IconContent. |
| Chip | Avatar | `string?` | `` | Leading avatar image URL, rendered as a rounded thumbnail before ChildContent. Takes precedence over Icon and IconContent. |
| Chip | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the chip is pressed (only applies when Clickable is true). Default is None. |
| Chip | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the chip's root div, after the size/variant/interactive classes. |
| Chip | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |
| ChipGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The group's Chip children, laid out in a wrapping flex row. |
| ChipGroup | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the group's root div. |
| ChipGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Chip) — The chip's label content, wrapped in a \<span\> between the leading icon/avatar and the close button.
- `IconContent` (Chip) — Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot \<span\>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.
- `ChildContent` (ChipGroup) — The group's Chip children, laid out in a wrapping flex row.

## Events
- `OnClose` (`EventCallback`) — Raised when the remove (X) button is clicked. Has no effect while Disabled is true.
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback`) — Raised on click or Enter/Space when Clickable is true. Has no effect while Disabled is true.

## Sub-components
- `ChipGroup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in Chip.razor
- `Space` — HandleKeyDown handles Space in Chip.razor

## Example
```razor
<Chip />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Chip/Chip.razor`
- `UI/Chip/ChipGroup.razor`
